name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.PrimaryHandWeaponDistance
summary: Distance from the shoulder to hold the weapon. If -1 and useIncomingTransforms then weaponDistance is read from ITMs. WeaponDistance=primaryHandWeaponDistance clamped [0.2f:m_maxArmReach=0.65] if useIncomingTransforms = false. pistol 0.60383, rifle 0.336.
remarks:
Default value = -1.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
